memoryArtifacts.headline: Philip ll
memoryArtifacts.description:
Philip II de Croÿ (1496–1549) was Seigneur de Croÿ, Count of Porcéan and first Duke of Aarschot.


Philippe II de Croÿ 
(by Jacques Le Boucq).
Philip belonged to the powerful House of Croÿ. He was the …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippe de Croÿ II於大約1496年出生在比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特阿爾特時，他的父親Henri de Croÿ41歲，母親Charlotte de Chateaubriand32歲。他於1520年8月30日與Anne van Chimay結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1549年4月享年54歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯艾維斯斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philippe de Croÿ II于大约1496年出生在比利时福拉阿姆-布拉班特阿爾特时，他的父亲Henri de Croÿ41岁，母亲Charlotte de Chateaubriand32岁。他于1520年8月30日与Anne van Chimay结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1549年4月享年54岁，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯艾維斯斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Croÿ
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Orkney): habitational name from any of several places called Croy, for example in Inverness-shire.
Probably also Irish: shortened form of   McCroy  , which is a variant of   McRoy  .

nameMeanings.name: Philippe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Philip
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

en.lifeSummary: When Philippe de Croÿ II was born about 1496, in Aarschot, Flemish Brabant, Belgium, his father, Henri de Croÿ, was 41 and his mother, Charlotte de Chateaubriand, was 32. He married Anne van Chimay on 30 August 1520. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died in April 1549, at the age of 54, and was buried in Avesnes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philippe de Croÿ II est né environ 1496, à Aarschot, Brabant Flamand, Belgique, son père, Henri de Croÿ, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Charlotte de Chateaubriand, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Anne van Chimay le 30 août 1520. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en avril 1549, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Avesnes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philippe de Croÿ II um 1496 in Aarschot, Flämisch Brabant, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henri de Croÿ 41 und seine Mutter Charlotte de Chateaubriand 32. Er hat am 30. August 1520 Anne van Chimay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im April 1549 im Alter von 54 Jahren und wurde in Avesnes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

Lui sposato Anne van Chimay il 30 agosto 1520. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel aprile 1549, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Avesnes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ko.Le Lion-D'Angers,Maine-Et-Loire,France: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 일 리오-드'아그르스
ko.lifeSummary: Philippe de Croÿ II(이)가 대략 1496년 벨기에 블라아스-브라반트 아아르슈트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henri de Croÿ(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Charlotte de Chateaubriand(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1520년 8월 30일 Anne van Chimay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1549년 4월 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 에베스네스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philippe de Croÿ II nasceu aproximadamente 1496, em Aarschot, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, seu pai, Henri de Croÿ, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Charlotte de Chateaubriand, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne van Chimay em 30 de agosto de 1520. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em abril de 1549, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Avesnes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.Le Lion-D'Angers,Maine-Et-Loire,France: л лион-д'ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philippe de Croÿ II родился около 1496 г. в местности аарщот, влаамс-брабант, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Henri de Croÿ было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Charlotte de Chateaubriand, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne van Chimay 30 августа 1520 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер апрель 1549 г. в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности авеснесь, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

Se casó con Anne van Chimay el 30 de agosto de 1520. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en abril de 1549, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Avesnes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
